scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name movecares --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:cf:worker: wrangler deploy workers/movecares-domain-proxy.js --name movecares-domain-proxy --compatibility-date 2026-06-15 --route movecares.com/* --route www.movecares.com/* --route busan.movecares.com/* --route haeundae.movecares.com/* --route seomyeon.movecares.com/* --route suyeong.movecares.com/* --route dongnae.movecares.com/*
